title: Efficient processing and sharing of data improving disease diagnosis and treatment
author: Ari Turunen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Next-generation analysis methods of genes and RNA molecules enable faster and easier analyses. Data can also be stored well and shared with research teams through the Allas user interface of CSC.
steps_raw: Next-generation analysis methods of genes and RNA molecules enable faster and easier analyses. Data can also be stored well and shared with research teams through the Allas user interface of CSC.
